backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Game and Show types, with hardcoded arrays of 100+ games and shows (titles, descriptions, embed URLs, thumbnails), mixing in blob storage functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—expanding GamesSection.tsx and ShowsSection.tsx to 100 entries with search/filter—to their target files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and key UI features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining light and dark OKLCH CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, accent, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the site title 'zakariasadeq7site123', viewport meta, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navigation, HeroSection, SectionCardGrid, and all seven content sections (Games, Proxy, Shows, Music, Apps, Hacks, LiveTV) plus Footer.
frontend/src/components/AppCard.tsx: Card component for a single app entry, displaying an emoji icon, name, description, and an 'Open App' button styled with neon blue accents.
frontend/src/components/AppsSection.tsx: Apps section rendering a grid of AppCards for eight social/media apps, with an inline iframe viewer that supports refresh and close controls.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the brand logo, seven navigation links, a caffeine.ai attribution, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Renders a game card with thumbnail (or emoji fallback), genre badge, title, description, and a Play button that triggers the onPlay callback. Includes hover animations and a play overlay.
frontend/src/components/GamePlayer.tsx: Full-screen modal overlay that embeds a game in an iframe with a header showing the game title, an open-in-new-tab button, and a close button (also closeable via Escape key).
frontend/src/components/GamesSection.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable grid of game cards fetched from the backend, falling back to a hardcoded list of games across genres like Arcade and Shooter; opens a GamePlayer modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/HackCard.tsx: Renders a single hack/tip card displaying a category badge, emoji, title, and description with hover styling.
frontend/src/components/HacksSection.tsx: Renders a section of 16 hardcoded hack/tip cards covering game cheats, browser tricks, keyboard shortcuts, and tech life hacks using the HackCard component.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a logo, headline, tagline, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to site sections like Games, Proxy, Music, and Live TV.
frontend/src/components/LiveTVCard.tsx: Renders a live TV channel card with an emoji icon area, live/category badges, hover overlay, channel name, description, and a Watch Live button that triggers the onWatch callback.
frontend/src/components/LiveTVPlayer.tsx: Modal overlay component that embeds a live TV channel in a 16:9 iframe with a header showing channel name, category, live badge, external link, and close button. Handles Escape key and backdrop click to close.
frontend/src/components/LiveTVSection.ts: Section component that renders a grid of 8 hardcoded live TV channels (news, science, finance, international) using LiveTVCard, and opens the selected channel in a LiveTVPlayer modal.
frontend/src/components/MusicCard.tsx: Card component for a music station displaying an emoji thumbnail, genre badge, hover play overlay, and a Listen button that triggers an onPlay callback.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx: Modal overlay component that embeds a music station in a 16:9 iframe with a header showing station name, genre, external link, and close button. Handles Escape key and backdrop click to close.
frontend/src/components/MusicSection.tsx: Section component that renders a grid of 8 hardcoded music stations (lofi, jazz, indie, etc.) using MusicCard, and opens the selected station in a MusicPlayer modal.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with a logo, desktop nav links (Games, Movies & TV, Proxy, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV), active-section highlighting via scroll detection, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProxySection.tsx: A web proxy UI component that lets users enter a URL, validates and normalizes it, then loads it in an embedded iframe with refresh and clear controls.
Renders a grid of clickable section cards (Games, Proxy, Movies, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV) that smooth-scroll to their corresponding page sections when clicked.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Displays a single show or movie card with a thumbnail (or emoji fallback), badge, description, and a 'Watch Now' button that triggers a provided callback.
frontend/src/components/ShowsSection.tsx: A shows/movies browsing section that fetches shows from the backend (with a large hardcoded fallback list), supports search filtering, and opens a VideoPlayer modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A fullscreen modal video player that embeds a show's URL in an iframe, supports Escape-to-close and open-in-new-tab, and locks body scroll while open.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer backend actor (anonymous or authenticated based on identity) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines two React Query hooks, `useGetAllGames` and `useGetAllShows`, that fetch game and show data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines CSS custom properties for a dark maroon/neon-blue theme, and provides neon glow text utilities and a grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, neon glow box shadows, border radii, font families, and background image gradients matching the site's dark neon-blue design system.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 13), summarizing all existing and planned features for the site including games, shows, proxy, apps, hacks, music, and live TV sections with an EDUrocks-style dark neon-blue UI.
